subject: Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor trigger 744061103/240730818 is not a GRB
body:
S. Dalessi (UAH) reports on behalf of the Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor Team:

"The Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor (GBM) trigger 744061103/240730818 at 19:38:18.37 UT
on 30 July 2024, tentatively classified as a GRB, is in fact not due
to a GRB. This trigger is likely due to solar flare."
